overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player character moves from a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an overpass, through a busy intersection, and into an open downtown street lined with massive glowing digital billboards and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: pedestrian walks past camera on the left temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing walking in the opposite direction passes by on the left
multiple cars driving past on the multi-lane road to the right

entered.detail: orange and yellow metal railing separating the sidewalk from the road
large illuminated vertical advertisement screen on the building wall
underside of the elevated highway structure overhead with visible beams
fluorescent light fixture hanging from the overpass structure
metal scaffolding framework attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a cyberpunk city. The player walks along a sheltered sidewalk bordered by an orange safety railing, with digital billboards and scaffolding visible on the left wall. Vehicles pass by on the right while a pedestrian walks past the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into the open intersection with visible sky
waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and navigating across the intersection, pausing for traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from right to left
distant figure crossing the street in the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: yellow zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt road surface
traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red light
large pink neon billboard with WET DREAM text visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the overpass into an open urban intersection. The scene features a yellow crosswalk, overhead traffic lights, and moderate vehicle traffic. The camera approaches and crosses the intersection while a silver sedan drives past, with the massive WET DREAM billboard becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown commercial street with massive digital displays

events.description: entering area with intense neon illumination from surrounding digital billboards
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk surrounded by towering digital advertisements and glowing neon signs

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: tall building with reflective glass windows covered in multiple digital screens
curved elevated roadway structure with support pillars
dense collection of illuminated advertisements and corporate logos on buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide downtown street bathed in neon light. The player walks past the massive WET DREAM billboard now close on the left, with towering glass skyscrapers covered in digital advertisements rising on both sides. The environment is fully exposed to the night sky with intense artificial lighting from countless screens and neon signs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered concrete underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving along a sheltered sidewalk bordered by orange safety railings and scaffolding while vehicles pass by on the right. As the camera emerges from the cover of the overpass, the scene opens into a busy urban intersection featuring yellow crosswalks and overhead traffic lights. The movement continues across the street, passing a silver sedan as the massive WET DREAM billboard comes into view in the distance. Finally, the environment expands into a wide downtown corridor where the camera walks directly past the towering billboard, surrounded by glass skyscrapers and intense artificial light from countless digital advertisements under the night sky.
